title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 443.863 - Unlawful discrimination for refusal to loan or vary terms of the loan
text:
443.863.  Unlawful discrimination for refusal to loan or vary terms of the loan. — It is unlawful discrimination to refuse loans or to vary the terms of loans or the application procedures for loans because of:
  (1)  The borrower's race, color, religion, national origin, age, gender or marital status; or
  (2)  The location of the proposed security.
(L. 1994 S.B. 718 § 22, A.L. 2001 S.B. 538, A.L. 2009 H.B. 382) 
Effective 7-08-09
